tools.name: D&D Beyond
tools.what: A website for character sheets, character building, rules lookup, leveling, spells, features, and equipment.
tools.playersUse: Players use it to open their sheet, create or level a character, check attacks and spells, and look up basic rules.
tools.dmUse: The DM uses it to keep the campaign roster organized and help players check rules or character options.

tools.name: Discord
tools.what: The group voice and text space for game night, scheduling, announcements, recaps, and side questions.
tools.playersUse: Players use it for voice chat, session scheduling, between-session questions, and table community.
tools.dmUse: The DM uses it to run voice chat, post reminders, share recaps, and keep table communication in one place.

tools.name: Owlbear Rodeo
tools.what: A lightweight virtual tabletop, or VTT, for maps, tokens, movement, positioning, fog, and visual combat reference.
tools.playersUse: Players use it to see the scene, move their token when allowed, and understand where characters and enemies are.
tools.dmUse: The DM uses it to prepare maps, control hidden areas, place enemies, and show important locations.

tools.name: Roll20
tools.what: An optional heavier virtual tabletop. Use it only if the campaign chooses Roll20 instead of Owlbear Rodeo.
tools.playersUse: Players can ignore Roll20 unless the DM says this campaign is using it.
tools.dmUse: The DM may use it for maps, tokens, sheets, or built-in tabletop tools if Owlbear is not enough.
